scripts.predev: node -e "const{existsSync}=require('fs');const p='packages/electron/resources/codegraph/VERSION';if(!existsSync(p)){console.log('[predev] CodeGraph not found, fetching...');const{execSync}=require('child_process');execSync('corepack pnpm fetch-codegraph',{stdio:'inherit'})}else{console.log('[predev] CodeGraph already fetched, skipping.')}"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @puddingagent/core build && corepack pnpm build:ui && corepack pnpm --filter puddingagent build && corepack pnpm --filter ./packages/vscode-extension build
scripts.build:electron: corepack pnpm --filter @puddingagent/core build && corepack pnpm build:ui && corepack pnpm --filter puddingagent build
scripts.package: corepack pnpm build && node scripts/fix-node-pty-permissions.mjs && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.postinstall: node scripts/fix-node-pty-permissions.mjs && node -e "if(process.platform==='darwin'){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('EPATH=node_modules/.pnpm/electron@33.4.11/node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app; if [ -d \"$EPATH\" ]; then cp assets/icon.icns \"$EPATH/Contents/Resources/electron.icns\" && /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c \"Set :CFBundleDisplayName Pudding-Agent\" -c \"Set :CFBundleName Pudding-Agent\" \"$EPATH/Contents/Info.plist\"; fi',{shell:'/bin/bash'})}catch(e){}}"
